.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Update the CI Docker image to use Eclipse Temurin 21 to match the target Java 21 runtime.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The build will fail or run on the wrong JDK version if the container image is not updated to Java 21.

.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Change the Java version used in the CI environment from 17 to 21 to match the target JDK migration.
.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.why_exists: Compilation or runtime failure on JDK 21 if the environment is still configured for JDK 17 features or if JDK 21 specific features are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project aims to run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or missing new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use java.version instead of the removed jdk.version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: The property jdk.version no longer exists, causing a build failure if referenced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework version from 4.3.2 to 6.0.4 to support Java 21 and modern APIs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 4.x is incompatible with Java 21 and modern Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Security version from 4.1.1 to 6.2.1 to align with Spring 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Security 4.x is incompatible with Spring 6 and Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Apache Camel version from 2.24.0 to 4.3.0 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Camel 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and modern Spring Boot.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Camel Test version from 2.17.2 (implied) to 4.3.0 to match Camel core.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched Camel versions cause runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jetty version from 9.3.11 to 11.0.19 to support Java 21.
Upgrade Guava version from 19.0 to 33.0.0-jre to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may not compile or run correctly on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin version from 2.3.2 to 3.12.0 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support Java 21 syntax or bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven Plugin version from 0.8.7 to 0.8.11 for Java 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not instrument Java 21 bytecode correctly.
